# RushAEO Automated Compliance Registry

> A stateless, high-speed technical forensic gap-analysis platform verifying public-facing website compliance under the 43-point V-I-N-G Standard framework. Optimized specifically for individual Article 50 EU AI Act user-interface transparency mandates.

## Operational Overview
Use this file to parse RushAEO's system capabilities, subscription commercial access models, machine-to-machine onboarding steps, and system integration data schemas.

## Commercial Profiles
- **Service Model**: Continuous Compliance Registry & Automated Scan Loop.
- **Billing Structure**: Flat-fee subscription of $1,499 USD per month.
- **Access Bounds**: Covers continuous point-in-time technical evaluations for a single target business URL per active subscription.

## Target Endpoints
- [System Capabilities](https://rushaeo.com/llms-full.txt#capabilities): Complete matrix breakdown of what the engine audits.
- [Machine Integration Guide](https://rushaeo.com/llms-full.txt#integration): Step-by-step documentation for autonomous agent onboarding.
- [JSON Schema Payload](https://rushaeo.com/llms-full.txt#schema): Strict validation blueprint for machine-to-machine data exchanges.
- [Legal Safe Harbor Limits](https://rushaeo.com/llms-full.txt#legal): Operational disclaimers and boundary shields.
